name: Luồng 1: Founder Form - Odoo search/create - router - Create OTP - data store - Twilio

contentType.label: application/x-www-form-urlencodedEnter form data as key-value pairs encoded in the URL style.

authenticationType.label: No authenticationUse when no credentials are required for the request.

expect.name: stopOnHttpError
expect.label: Return error if HTTP request fails

expect.name: shareCookies
expect.label: Share cookies with other HTTP modules

mapper.body: {"status":"error", "message":"Ihre Telefonnummer wurde bereits verwendet, bitte versuchen Sie eine andere Telefonnummer"}

mapper.parameters:
[
  {
    "name": "{{1.name}}",
    "phone": "{{3.e164}}",
    "email": "{{1.email}}",

    "x_studio_sms_opt_in_1": "yes",
    "x_studio_opt_in_text": "Ich stimme der Verifizierung sowie dem Erhalt von Infos, Updates und Rewards per SMS/WhatsApp zu.",
    "x_studio_opt_in_timestamp": "{{formatDate(now; "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss"; " Europe/Berlin")}}",

    "x_studio_founder_terms_accepted": "yes",
    "x_studio_kc_terms_accepted": "no",
    "x_studio_otp_verified": "no",
    "x_studio_founder_status": "Pending Verification",
    "x_studio_founder_level": "Trial",

    "x_studio_last_reminder_date": "{{formatDate(now; "YYYY-MM-DD")}}",
    "x_studio_total_spent": 0,
    "x_number_of_visits": 0,
    "x_studio_notes": "Founder Form Registration"
  }
]

interface.help: Important: Choose "Date" so Make can compare times.
interface.name: expires_at

interface.help: Set to 0 initially to track failed guesses
interface.name: attempts_verify

mapper.body:
Hallo  {{first(split(1.name; ))}}! ✨!Ihr Code für den Founder-Zugang ist: *{{17.otp_code}}*. Bitte antworten Sie nur mit diesen 6 Ziffern.
QUAN ESSKULTURE TEAM
